序列化表格

  • 程序包 com.android.decode

    • 类com.android.decode.DecodeException扩展java.lang.RuntimeException实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -5372948597510312539L

      • 序列化字段

        • error_number

          int error_number
          The error number returned by the Decoding Subsystem.

  • 程序包 com.android.device

    • 类com.android.device.DeviceException扩展java.lang.RuntimeException实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -5272048517513312431L

      • 序列化字段

        • error_number

          int error_number
          The error number returned by the Device's system services.

  • 程序包 com.android.device.configuration

    • 类com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException扩展java.lang.RuntimeException实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -5274068117313512131L

      • 序列化字段

        • error_number

          int error_number
          The error number returned by the Configuration Subsystem.

        • bad_id_buffer

          int[] bad_id_buffer
          The buffer of parameters IDs that caused error, returned by the Configuration Subsystem. Only if bad_id_length > 0, bad_id_buffer is meaningful.

        • bad_id_length

          int bad_id_length
          The length of bad_id_buffer returned by the Configuration Subsystem.
